Dr. Li Wei

Senior Researcher, Theoretical Physics

Beijing Institute of Technology

Biography Profile

Dr. Wei's research investigates the intersection of dark matter and gravitational fields. His recent simulation models suggest potential localized manipulation of the Higgs field to reduce inertial mass. He regularly collaborates with international teams on the unified field project.

Symposium Presentation

"Inertial Mass Reduction via Higgs Field Modulation"

Presenting findings from the latest supercomputer simulations on altering inertial mass. If viable, this theoretical approach could solve the g-force limitations on human spaceflight.
